_structure_note: vendor_key format: "{manufacturer} [{machine}] @ {layer}μm [({post})]". Same manufacturer with a different machine or layer is a separate entry. The machine field is auto-populated with each manufacturer's flagship per their TDS (Nikon SLM=NXG XII 600, EOS=M290, Renishaw=RenAM 500S, etc.).
_category_top_source: Nikon SLM Solutions catalog (https://nikon-slm-solutions.com/materials/) + 'Other' bucket for anything Nikon doesn't list.

2026-05-25.note: Single values stored as midpoint of BLT's published range; full lo-hi range preserved in vendor entry _value_ranges field.

2026-05-26.note: Velo3D entries cover Sapphire 240W/310W/500W/1kW × 50μm/100μm × multiple post-processing states. Many Ti6Al4V / IN718 / CuNi30 rows include both XY and Z values.
